cards.afterText:
If you won the combat, choose 1 effect, then shuffle your deck: 
- Search your deck for any card. Add it to your hand.
- Draw 4 cards, keep 2, and return the other 2 to the deck.
cards.title: I CAN BRING YOU IN WARM...

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you defeated the opposing fighter, draw 1 more card.
cards.title: ... OR I CAN BRING YOU IN COLD

cards.afterText: Move The Mandalorian up to 4 spaces.
cards.duringText: If The Child is still alive, the value of this card is 7.
cards.title: THIS IS THE WAY

cards.afterText: If The Child is still alive, draw 1 card.
cards.title: BESKAR ARMOR

cards.afterText: The player controlling the opposing fighter loses 1 action next turn.
cards.basicText: This card may only be used to attack an adjacent fighter.
cards.title: PULSE SHOCK

cards.basicText: The Mandalorian deals 2 damage to all opposing fighters he can attack.
cards.title: WHISTLING BIRDS

cards.basicText: Choose a fighter The Mandalorian can attack. Deal 2 damage to that fighter. If you are adjacent to that fighter, you may move that fighter up to 3 spaces.
cards.title: FLAMETHROWER

cards.basicText: Choose a fighter The Mandalorian can attack. Move that fighter adjacent to The Mandalorian. Deal 2 damage to that fighter.
cards.title: CABLE SHOT

cards.basicText: Place The Mandalorian in any space. If The Child is still alive, draw 1 card. If The Child was adjacent to The Mandalorian before playing this card, you may also place The Child in any space adjacent to The Mandalorian's new space.
cards.title: RISING PHOENIX

cards.afterText:
Choose 1 effect: 
- The Mandalorian recovers 2 health.
- The Child recovers 2 health.
cards.duringText: Move the opposing fighter up to 1 space. If The Child is no longer in that fighter's range, prevent all damage.
cards.title: FORCE POWERS

cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: FEINT

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you won the combat, draw 2 cards instead.
cards.title: REGROUP

cards.afterText: Move your fighter up to 3 spaces.
cards.title: DASH

hero.name: The Mandalorian
hero.specialAbility:
When the Mandalorian plays a card to defend, add 1 to that card's value for each BESKAR ARMOR card in your discard pile. 
If you draw any BESKAR ARMOR cards to start the game, reshuffle and draw again.
hero.quote: A lone bounty hunter who only gets harder to kill — every beskar card in the discard pile hardens his defense as the fight drags on. This is the way.

sidekick.name: The Child
sidekick.quote: Small, quiet, and worth more than every bounty in the guild — the whole reason to keep fighting.

name: The Mandalorian
note:
Partial credit for this fan deck goes to BGG user @RomanFarraday, whose original ideas and willingness to collaborate inspired my first foray into the world of Unmatched variants. This is my favorite version of the many Mando decks created and debated on BGG.

Version 1.1 - added card back URL on 2/1/2021.
Version 1.2 - minor clarifying language added to special ability and FORCE POWERS effect ("up to 1 space") on 2/27/2021.
